content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: Files 87100, 87103, 87103(c), 18702(b)(3)

Date: March 19, 1982

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION  
Diane Maura Fishburn

Subject: Out of Pocket Expenses by Public Official - Telephone Advice to Lynda Millspaugh, Deputy County Counsel in Sonoma

FACTS:

The Planning Commission is going to vote on an airport's use permit, i.e., whether the airport may continue to operate or not.

One of the Planning Commissioners leases a hangar at the airport for his airplane. The rent is approximately $100 to $130. The leasehold is month-to-month.

ADVICE:

I advised that if the Planning Commissioner would either incur or avoid expenses of $100 or more as a result of the decision, he could not participate in the decision.

DMF:plh
